Reeva Taneja
C
Mrs Reeva Batra Taneja is an English Language Facilitator, IELTS Trainer, Vastu Consultant and a
Vedic Scholar. Convent education and her experience of over twenty years as a consultant, counsellor
.
and teacher, have made her acknowledge that even today, the Indian mind is largely colonized due to
O
the misrepresentations of the vedic scriptures and their absence from the academic curriculum. In her
humble effort to spread the greatness of the vedic lifestyle to the english- speaking modern generations,
R
she is creating simple yet effective content for the learners. She integrates her knowledge of multiple
subjects and teaches English and the basics of Vedic Sciences with an interdisciplinary approach.
